# PUSD — Push USD

> PUSD is the native USD stablecoin for Push Chain. It ships as a two-tier product:
> a boring par-backed token (PUSD) for payments and settlement, and an ERC-4626 yield
> wrapper (PUSD+) that delivers blended stablecoin yield to holders. The frontend
> defaults to PUSD+; plain PUSD is one toggle away for integrators.

The authoritative architecture is [ADR 0003](docs/design/decisions/0003-product-architecture.md).
Design docs live in `/docs`. Machine-readable context for coding agents lives in `/agents`.
Solidity contracts live in `/contracts/src`. The frontend lives in `/app`.

## Docs

- [Docs index](docs/README.md): Start here.
- [Overview](docs/design/overview.md): One-page product summary — what PUSD is, what PUSD+ is, how they relate.
- [Architecture](docs/design/architecture.md): Four-contract layout — PUSD, PUSDManager, PUSD+, PUSDLiquidity. Roles, storage, reserve slicing.
- [Mint & redeem flow](docs/design/mint-redeem-flow.md): The three redemption paths (preferred → basket → emergency) and the atomic PUSD+ mint/wrap flow.
- [Invariants](docs/design/invariants.md): Protocol safety properties — I-01 through I-12.
- [Risks](docs/design/risks.md): Failure modes and mitigations.
- [Open questions](docs/design/open-questions.md): Unresolved design questions.

## Decisions

- [ADR 0001 — Why PUSDManager exists](docs/design/decisions/0001-why-pusdmanager-exists.md): Separation of token and reserve logic.
- [ADR 0002 — Access control model](docs/design/decisions/0002-access-control-model.md): Role layout across all four contracts.
- [ADR 0003 — Product architecture (two-tier)](docs/design/decisions/0003-product-architecture.md): The authoritative v2 architecture decision. PUSD boring + PUSD+ yield-bearing ERC-4626 wrapper, PUSDLiquidity owned by PUSD+, par/yield-share accounting.

## Agent Context (Machine-Readable)

- [Repo map](agents/repo-map.md): One-line description per file.
- [PUSD.sol context](agents/pusd.context.md)
- [PUSDManager.sol context](agents/pusdmanager.context.md)
- [PUSDPlus.sol context](agents/pusdplus.context.md)
- [PUSDLiquidity.sol context](agents/pusdliquidity.context.md)
- [Invariants (machine-readable)](agents/invariants.context.md)

## Research (Historical)

Research notes are encrypted at rest. See [docs/research/](docs/research/) and `scripts/decrypt-research.sh`.
These predate ADR 0003 and describe single-contract ideation; **they are superseded** by the design docs above.

## Optional

- [Deployment runbook](DEPLOYMENT.md): How to deploy and configure the protocol.
- [Frontend app](app/): React + Vite dApp at `/app`. Direction: brutalist editorial (Design C).
- [Encryption scripts](scripts/): `setup-encryption.sh`, `encrypt-research.sh`, `decrypt-research.sh`.
